sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29471" key="duspro/srhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσπρόσ-ρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to speak with</tr_>, condemned by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
